evals.prompt: Show monthly revenue for the past 6 months as a bar chart. Use months on the x-axis and revenue in dollars on the y-axis. Use a tooltip that shows the exact value.
evals.expected_output: A BarChart inside ChartContainer with correct axis setup, tooltip, and themed colors via chartConfig.
expectations: Uses ChartContainer with a chartConfig object
Uses BarChart and Bar from recharts
Does NOT import ResponsiveContainer (it's built into ChartContainer)
Uses hsl(var(--chart-1)) or chart-* tokens for colors — no raw hex or bg-* classes

evals.prompt: Build an analytics dashboard with three charts: a line chart for daily active users over 30 days, a pie chart showing traffic source breakdown, and an area chart for weekly signups.
evals.expected_output: Three separate ChartContainer instances with appropriate chart types, correct recharts primitives, and theme-safe colors throughout.
expectations: Uses ChartContainer wrapping each chart — never ResponsiveContainer
Uses LineChart, PieChart, and AreaChart from recharts appropriately
Each chart has its own chartConfig with descriptive labels and chart-* token colors
No raw hex colors or Tailwind palette classes (bg-blue-500 etc.) on chart elements
Does not import or use ResponsiveContainer

evals.prompt: Show a comparison bar chart with two data series — actual vs target revenue — for each quarter. Include a legend and labeled axes.
evals.expected_output: A grouped BarChart with two Bar components, a Legend, proper XAxis/YAxis, all inside ChartContainer with a chartConfig covering both series.
expectations: Uses ChartContainer with chartConfig covering both data series
Two Bar components with distinct chart-* token colors
